integrationStatus.cpp_best_practices: Empty - Need C++ best practices documentation

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from ISO C++ standards, cppreference.com, and reputable C++ resources. Prioritize official ISO C++ documentation and C++ Core Guidelines.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: spec_name.html, guide_name.html
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official ISO C++ and open-source documentation.
instructions.cppFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand C++ language standards, (2) follow C++ Core Guidelines, (3) implement C++ debugging techniques, (4) follow C++ best practices, (5) identify C++ patterns and anti-patterns.
